assertions.expectation: Identifies Service A (minAvailable=100%) as a guaranteed upgrade blocker — no disruptions allowed at all
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies Service A as 'BLOCKS UPGRADES' with 'Zero disruption allowed - will prevent node drain'

assertions.expectation: Identifies Service B (maxUnavailable=0) as also blocking upgrades — same effect as 100% minAvailable
assertions.reason: Response identifies Service B as 'BLOCKS UPGRADES' and explicitly states it's 'Same as 100% available - zero disruption allowed'

assertions.expectation: States Service C (minAvailable=2 with 3 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod disruption at a time
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly marks Service C as 'RISKY' and says 'may cause issues', not 'safe' as expected

assertions.expectation: States Service D (maxUnavailable=1 with 5 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod down at a time
assertions.reason: Response correctly identifies Service D as 'SAFE' and confirms it 'Allows 1 disruption, keeps 4/5 running'

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service A: change to minAvailable=N-1 or maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Response provides specific fix for Service A with 'minAvailable: 80%' and shows alternative configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service B: change to maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'maxUnavailable: 1' for Service B in the configuration section

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then may force-drain
assertions.reason: Response states 'GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour, then may force-delete pods' in the Critical Issues section

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl patch commands to fix the problematic PDBs
assertions.reason: Response includes kubectl patch command example: 'kubectl patch pdb SERVICE-A-PDB -n NAMESPACE -p '{"spec":{"minAvailable":"80%"}}'

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing PDB changes in a non-production environment first
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Test: Validate PDB behavior in staging with a test upgrade' in the Action Items section
